persona_catalog.description: Strong software engineering, building AI/ML depth.

questions.prompt: What is the one concrete outcome you want by the end of the next 6 to 8 weeks?
How many hours per week can you realistically commit, consistently?

persona_catalog.description: Strong ML, needs deployment and engineering practice.

questions.prompt: Do you already have a project or idea, even if rough? Describe it.
What would make the next 6-8 weeks worthwhile?

persona_catalog.archetype: Builder who ships but skips evaluation
persona_catalog.description: Ships AI features fast, light on evaluation rigor.

questions.prompt: How do you currently measure whether your AI feature works?

transcript.content: What do you want to build in 6-8 weeks?

member_message: I'm a senior backend engineer with 8 years in Go and Python. I've never used an LLM API but I want to ship a production RAG service.
